author: u/Baldjorn
title: Date catfished me using photos of her best friend...then brought her bestfriend to the date for girl support...
body: Don't catfish please. If you are going to do it. At least think it through. I got catfished by a girl who used pictures of her "pretty friend". When I went to the date the girl asked if she could bring her friend. I said sure.

I arrive and introduce myself to who I thought was my date, y'know the girl I've been talking to for a week on bumble, she gets confused and points over to the friend who waves at me. I was very confused.

After a dizzying conversation I eventually asked if this is a prank. They started to get confused and annoyed. I pulled out bumble and showed the girl I thought I was on a date with and she was shocked to see herself as the profile but with her friend's name.

It wasn't until this girl was visibly pissed off did it click in the catfisher's brain that this may have been a bad idea. They began to argue, catfisher acting like a victim, and the friend trying to make logical sense of it all. I just fiddled with the paper straw like a fidget spinner, staying mute.
I eventually excused myself to the bathroom quietly and hung out there a little bit, taking my time, reading a couple articles, taking a poop cause why not.

I came back and the "pretty friend" was still there to apologize for her friend catfishing me. I asked if she was interested in having a date and she said I'm probably a great guy but she has a boyfriend. We went our ways and I went bought myself sushi as a reparations for this wacky event...Please don't catfish...it never ever works out!!!
narration:
So I matched with this girl on Bumble. We talked for a week — seemed great. She asks if she can bring a friend to the date. I say sure, no big deal.

I show up. I walk over and introduce myself to who I THINK is my date — the girl from her profile. She gets confused. Looks at me weird. And then points behind her to her friend, who's just casually waving at me.

I'm... very confused.

After a dizzying back-and-forth I finally ask — is this a PRANK? They get confused AND annoyed. So I pull out Bumble, show the girl I thought was my date her own face on someone else's profile. She is PISSED.

And THAT'S when it finally clicked in the catfisher's brain that bringing the person whose photos you stole to the date was maybe — MAYBE — a bad idea.

They start arguing. Catfisher plays victim. The friend tries to make logical sense of it all. I'm just sitting there spinning a paper straw like a fidget spinner. Completely silent.

I quietly excused myself to the bathroom. Took my time. Read some articles. Took a poop. Why not.

When I came back, the pretty friend was STILL there to apologize on behalf of her disaster of a friend. I figured, what the heck — I asked if she wanted to grab a real date. She said I seemed like a great guy, but she has a boyfriend.

We parted ways. I went and bought myself sushi. Reparations for the chaos.

Don't catfish. It NEVER works out.
